required_fixes: [high] Wire trip-specific Vally routing correctly: use authoritative booking path/id (e.g., vallyBookingPath) in CTA URL generation instead of ignoring it.
[medium] Harden Vally URL builder against malformed NEXT_PUBLIC_VALLY_URL (try/catch + fallback to default URL).
[low] Normalize analytics event naming (valy vs vally, booking_start vs complete_redirect) to a single schema.
[low] Add distinct footer CTA placement event instead of reusing header placement label.
notes: Build and lint pass in app/.
All required MVP routes render and primary CTA surfaces are present.
No obvious P0/P1 security issues detected in reviewed code.
